news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in San Diego, Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: AARD), a company specializing in small-molecule therapeutics for metabolic diseases, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ended on March 31, 2025. Aardvark is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical corporation that concentrates on activating innate homeostatic pathways. This quarter's financial report and business achievements were announced by the company, aiming to advance its innovative treatments.
news.headline: Aardvark Therapeutics (Nasdaq: AARD) released Q1 2025 financial results and business updates.

news.summary: Today, in locations such as Lille (France), Cambridge (Massachusetts, United States), and Zurich (Switzerland) on May 14, 2025, GENFIT (listed on Nasdaq and Euronext under the ticker GNFT) released its 2025 Extra-Financial Performance Report detailing their fiscal year 2024 achievements. GENFIT is focused on enhancing the well-being of patients grappling with rare and severe liver ailments.
news.headline: Biopharmaceutical company GENFIT releases 2025 Extra-Financial Report for fiscal year 2024, aiming to help liver disease patients.

news.summary: New Fortress Energy Inc. (Nasdaq: NFE) has finalized the sale of its Jamaican assets and operations to Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) for a total of $1.055 billion, as originally disclosed on March 27, 2025. The deal will see Excelerate taking over ownership fully. The transaction aims to help NFE decrease its corporate debt and support general corporate activities with the proceeds.
news.headline: New Fortress Energy sells Jamaica assets to Excelerate Energy for $1.055 billion, announces Q1 2025 results.

news.summary: Sypris Solutions, Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 30, 2025. Despite strong customer orders, revenue was lower compared to the same period last year. This decline was attributed to factors such as a downturn in the commercial vehicle market and the shift of some shipments at the Mexico facility to a value-add only sub-maquiladora basis. Additionally, delays in customer delivery schedules for Sypris Electronics also impacted revenue. The company trades on Nasdaq under the symbol SYPR.
news.headline: Sypris Solutions reports Q1 results, revenue down due to  decline in commercial vehicle market.

news.summary: Spire Global, Inc., a leading provider of space data and services, has announced a significant contract win with the U.S. Space Force’s Space Systems Command. The 10-year Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract, secured under the Space Test Experiments Platform (STEP) 2.0 program, has a total value of $237 million. This contract is a part of the Department of Defense’s Space Test Program and involves Spire being chosen among 12 other companies to provide crucial services.
news.headline: Spire Global earns $237 million ceiling U.S. Space Force contract - part of 10-year program.

news.summary: The stock price of Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE: COF) declined following a lawsuit filed by New York Attorney General Letitia James. The lawsuit alleges that the banking company engaged in a deceptive scheme over multiple years, where they froze interest rates on existing savings accounts while offering higher rates to new customers. This resulted in millions of dollars in lost interest for long-standing account holders. The complaint, filed in the Southern District of New York, claims that Capital One operated a misleading "two-tier" savings account system that unfairly treated older customers. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: New York sues Capital One over hidden interest rate scheme that cost consumers millions. COF shares slide.

news.summary: LightPath Technologies (NASDAQ: LPTH) is due to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, May 15, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.05. The market is eager for positive news or guidance that surpasses estimates, as this can impact stock prices significantly. In the previous quarter, LightPath missed EPS by $0.03, resulting in a 7.37% drop in share price the following day. Current stock price is $2.72, showing a 93.38% increase over the last 52 weeks. With 2 analyst ratings, it's essential for investors to consider market sentiments and expectations before making decisions. Full story at Benzinga.com.
news.headline: LightPath Technologies to release quarterly earnings, -0.05 EPS expected. Past performance shows a 7.37% drop after missing estimates. Trading at $2.72, up 93.38% in 52 weeks. Analysts' insights crucial for investors.

news.summary: Shimmick Corp., a leading infrastructure solutions provider, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. They reported revenue of $122 million, including $93 million from Shimmick Projects. The gross margin was $5 million, an improvement from the previous year. They reported a net loss of $10 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $(3) million. Backlog stood at approximately $740 million, with over 87% from Shimmick Projects. Selling, general and administrative expenses were $14 million, down by 11%. Shimmick Projects revenue saw an increase, mainly due to new projects. Legacy Projects revenue decreased as they wind down. The Company projects revenue increase for Shimmick Projects by 10% to 15% for the fiscal year, with adjusted EBITDA between $15 million and $25 million. They attributed the positive results to a disciplined approach and strong strategy execution. The Company will host a conference call and webcast regarding these results. Their financials indicate resilience amid macroeconomic challenges, positioning them for future growth. Revenue breakdown and financial outlook for the fiscal year reflect their focus on sustainable infrastructure solutions.
news.headline: Shimmick Corp. reports Q1 2025 revenue of $122M, gross margin of $5M, net loss of $10M, and backlog of $740M with significant growth expected.

The specific figures regarding revenue, sales, and other financial metrics were disclosed in the report.

news.summary: Today, a Nevada corporation known as FG Merger II Corp. revealed that it has signed a Side Letter related to its underwriting agreement. The company, which is a blank check entity, shared this update on May 14, 2025. The Side Letter was created in conjunction with the underwriter, and signifies an important development for the Company.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, on May 14, 2025, it has been reported that product orders have seen a significant increase of 20% year over year. Excluding Splunk, orders are up by 9%. This growth has been observed in all geographical regions and customer markets. Notably, AI Infrastructure orders from webscale customers have surpassed $600 million, surpassing the company's initial target of $1 billion.
news.headline: Cisco's Q3 earnings report reveals 20% product order growth (9% excluding Splunk), with AI Infrastructure orders from webscale customers surpassing $600 million target.

news.summary: CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV), headquartered in Livingston, N.J., announced remarkable financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The AI Hyperscaler™ experienced substantial growth driven by a surge in demand for its purpose-built AI platform. The accelerating demand contributed to a positive performance for the company during this period.
news.headline: CoreWeave (Nasdaq: CRWV) reports strong Q1 2025 results, driven by demand for its AI platform.

news.summary: Sera Prognostics Inc., known as The Pregnancy Company®, based in Salt Lake City, declared that they will be presenting at a forthcoming event. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol SERA, specializes in enhancing maternal and neonatal health through the provision of advanced pregnancy biomarker data to physicians and clients. This recent announcement was made on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Sera Prognostics Inc. (Nasdaq: SERA) to present at RBC Global Healthcare Conference; focused on improving maternal and neonatal health.

news.summary: Numerous studies included in a recent literature review meeting specific criteria indicated a clear correlation between higher doses of glucocorticoids and adverse clinical outcomes. These findings were presented at the 2025 International Society for Pharmacoeconomics and Outcomes Research Annual Meeting in San Diego. The data showed a statistically significant association between increased glucocorticoid dosage and negative health effects.
news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences' findings show high-dose glucocorticoids linked to increased adverse clinical outcomes in Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia - 2025 International Society for Pharmacoeconomics and Outcomes Research Annual Meeting.

news.summary: As of March 31, 2025, the total cash and investments stood at $9.8 million, adjusted to reflect the first tranche of private placement financing that concluded on April 2, 2025. In 2025, three new clinical study sites have been activated, beginning patient screening. Additionally, five more sites are set to be activated soon.
news.headline: Talphera's Q1 2025: Cash and investments at $9.8 million, three new clinical study sites activated.

news.summary: Positive results from the Phase 1 Multiple Ascending Dose (MAD) trial of DA-1726 in obesity have been revealed. The trial showed significant weight loss efficacy, promising potential for glucose control, waist reduction, and high tolerability. Further cohorts are set to be conducted to ascertain the maximum tolerated dosage of DA-1726.
news.headline: MetaVia reports positive Phase 1 MAD trial results for DA-1726 in obesity, showing weight loss & glucose control potential.
Putin decree does not say he plans to go to Istanbul for talks.

news.summary: PRGN-2012 could become the leading treatment for RRP in Company's pipeline. The BLA for PRGN-2012, intended for adults with RRP, is undergoing priority review by the FDA, with a PDUFA target action date scheduled for August 27, 2025. RRP is a rare, chronic disease that severely impacts individuals. This potential breakthrough in treatment awaits FDA's decision in a few years.
news.headline: Precigen's PRGN-2012 could be top treatment for RRP; FDA's priority review set for Aug 27, 2025.

news.summary: New information on the Phase 1 ENABLE clinical trial of ELVN-001 for CML will be shared at the EHA 2025 Congress in June. According to an EHA abstract, the trial reported a cumulative MMR rate of 44% (16 out of 36 patients) within 24 weeks, with 26% (7 out of 27 patients) achieving MMR by the same time point. ELVN-001 continues to exhibit good tolerance levels among participants.
news.headline: Enliven Therapeutics reports Q1 results, updated Phase 1 trial data of ELVN-001 shows 44% MMR rate by 24 weeks at EHA 2025 Congress.

news.summary: In a virtual annual general meeting held today via live audio webcast, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL), based in Vaughan, ON, revealed the outcomes of the shareholder vote. The meeting saw shareholders supporting all resolutions put forward, marking a successful session for the company.
news.headline: GFL Environmental Inc. reports results from shareholders meeting. Company voted in favor of all resolutions.

news.summary: Today, Illumina, Inc. (NASDAQ: ILMN) shared that its executives are scheduled to participate in the upcoming 41st Annual Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28, 2025. The event will feature a fireside chat at 11:30am Pacific Time (2:30pm Eastern Time).
news.headline: Illumina executives to speak at Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28, 2025 at 11:30am PT (2:30pm ET).

news.summary: Penske Automotive Group, Inc. has announced its 18th consecutive quarterly dividend increase, with the dividend rising by 3.3% to $1.26 per share. Additionally, they have further bolstered their securities repurchase authorization by an additional $250 million. The company, headquartered in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, made this announcement on May 14, 2025. Penske Automotive Group, Inc. operates as a diversified international entity listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PAG.
news.headline: Penske Automotive Group increases dividend by 3.3% to $1.26 per share for the 18th consecutive quarter and raises securities repurchase authorization by $250 million.

news.summary: Azitra is set to administer its precision dermatology candidate ATR04-484 in a Phase 1/2 trial by the first half of 2025. This candidate aims to address EGFR inhibitor-associated rash. The company is based in Branford, Connecticut, as of May 14, 2025. Azitra, Inc. is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol AZTR.
news.headline: Azitra to present abstract at ASGCT on Phase 1/2 study for EGFR inhibitor rash treatment in 2025. $AZTR plans first patient dosing.

news.headline: Lam Research Corp. officials to attend investor events per PR on May 14, 2025 in Fremont, California.

The Chief Executive Officer, Lance Tucker, expressed optimism regarding upcoming marketing strategies for the latter part of 2025, aiming to boost sales amidst challenging industry conditions. An initiative named 'JACK on Track' had been previously introduced, emphasizing the company's commitment to enhancing performance in the current operational landscape.

Shimmick Corp. is a prominent company specializing in infrastructure services related to water management, climate adaptation, renewable energy adoption, and eco-friendly transportation solutions.
news.headline: Shimmick Corp in Irvine, CA has announced Q1 2025 financial results. Key areas: water, climate resilience, energy transition, and sustainable transportation.

news.summary: A leading oncology group in the US, The Oncology Institute, Inc. (NASDAQ: TOI), based in CERRITOS, Calif., recently appointed Dr. Jeffrey Langsam as the enterprise Chief Clinical Officer on May 13, 2025. With a background in healthcare leadership, Dr. Langsam was previously the National Director of Oncology at Cigna Healthcare and a Senior Medical Director in the Specialty Pharmacy Division. Before that, he held the position of a Regional Medical Director at Aetna and was part of the clinical faculty at the University of Connecticut where he practiced as an oncologist. In his new capacity, he will be responsible for overseeing therapeutic decisions, including pathways and procurement, utilization management, and MSO practice clinical engagements at TOI.
news.headline: Dr. Jeff Langsam joins The Oncology Institute as Chief Clinical Officer, overseeing therapeutics decisions, with a background in oncology from previous roles at Cigna Healthcare and Aetna.

news.summary: Announcing advancements in tariff mitigation efforts, a company provided updates on their strategy and revealed a cost optimization plan aimed at slashing annual expenses by $5 to $6 million. The plan is designed to streamline spending and bolster financial efficiency.
news.headline: Aterian announces Q1 financial results, plans to reduce annual spending by $5-6 million with cost optimization plan.

news.summary: Headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware, Bannix Acquisition Corp. has recently disclosed that their Board of Directors has opted to push back the deadline for completing an initial business combination. Originally set for May 14, 2025, the new deadline has been extended by a month to June 14, 2025. This decision provides them with added time to finalize the critical transaction.
news.headline: Bannix Acquisition Corp. extends initial business combination deadline to June 14, 2025, from May 14, 2025.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, The Oncology Institute, Inc. (NASDAQ: TOI), a prominent value-based community oncology group in the U.S., based in Cerritos, California, announced its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. As one of the leading players in the industry, TOI's report provides key insights into its financial standing and operational activities during this period. This update showcases TOI's significant presence and influence in the healthcare sector, emphasizing its position as a major player in the field of oncology services.
news.headline: The Oncology Institute (NASDAQ: TOI) reports Q1 2025 financial results, reaffirms full year 2025 guidance.

news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida on May 14, 2025, Silo Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: SILO) disclosed that they have partnered with Veloxity Labs, LLC for bioanalysis to aid in the current investigational new drug (IND) process. The study, conducted under Good Laboratory Practice (GLP) guidelines, focuses on toxicology and toxicokinetics for their primary candidate, SPC-15. SPC-15 is an intranasal prophylactic treatment designed for post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), marking Silo's dedication to advancing innovative therapeutics and drug delivery systems in the biopharmaceutical sector.
news.headline: Silo Pharma partners with Veloxity Labs for bioanalytical study on SPC-15, intranasal PTSD therapy. Good news for Silo's development goals.

news.summary: Omnicell, a company based in Fort Worth, Texas, has recently introduced a range of innovative products tailored for perioperative and clinic environments. These new offerings are designed to enhance efficiency and streamline processes in healthcare settings.Omnicell's latest releases aim to improve patient care and optimize operational workflows in these specific areas.
news.headline: Omnicell releases new products for perioperative and clinic settings in Fort Worth, Texas.

news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida, the Cade Prize for Inventivity, established in 2010 to honor Dr. Robert Cade, the inventor of Gatorade, has been recognizing and supporting early-stage inventors and entrepreneurs through equity-free cash prizes and other resources to facilitate the development and launch of their ideas. Commemorating Dr. Cade's legacy, the 2025 Cade Prize has collaborated with Gatorade to introduce a fresh category known as Inventivity in Sports. This additional category underscores the significance of innovation and creativity in athletics.
news.headline: Cade Prize competition adds Sports category with Gatorade in 2025 to honor Dr. Robert Cade, offering equity-free cash prizes.
